subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! These servants have turned their faces towards the Kingdom of Thy oneness and the Dominion of Thy singleness, and the fire hath been kindled [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی هولاء عباد توجهوا الی ملکوت وحدانیتک و جبروت فردانیتک و اضطرمت نار
subcodes.subjects: @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @call to action, @spiritual transformation, @praise and encouragement
